title: erythrina stricta var. yunnanensis
intro: Erythrina stricta var. yunnanensis, also known as the Yunnan coral tree, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Erythrina stricta var. yunnanensis include relief from fever, headache, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried flowers, leaves, or roots in hot water, or it can be processed into capsules or tablets for easier consumption.
